framing-doc.title: Framing Doc
framing-doc.description: Create a frame from research, notes, requests, or transcripts when the current problem, desired outcome, boundaries, and evidence need to become explicit.

shaping.title: Shaping
shaping.description: Shape ambiguous product work before implementation by defining criteria and appetite, comparing solution directions, and recording the selected shape and cut line.

sketch-reconciliation.title: Sketch Reconciliation
sketch-reconciliation.description: Reconcile a screenshot, wireframe, mockup, whiteboard, or sketch with existing planning artifacts when visual evidence may change the frame, criteria, scope, or shape.

breadboarding.title: Breadboarding
breadboarding.description: Map current-state behavior or a selected design into places, affordances, stores, consequences, and wiring when concrete behavior or candidate slices need clarification.

statechart.title: Statechart
statechart.description: Derive states and transitions from an accepted breadboard when retries, timeouts, approvals, lifecycle stages, or multiple valid actions make behavior difficult to review.

interface-contracts.title: Interface Contracts
interface-contracts.description: Define plain-language inputs, outputs, branches, errors, and open decisions when a selected slice crosses a meaningful data, service, or system boundary.

executable-breadboards.title: Executable Breadboards
executable-breadboards.description: Turn a selected slice into fixtures, example runs, expected outputs, edge cases, and acceptance tests when it is ready for a buildable behavioral handoff.

dumplink.title: Dumplink
dumplink.description: Plan work inside a selected slice as vertical task groups with dependencies, risks, sequence, and appetite-based cuts; before selection, produce candidates only.

kickoff-doc.title: Kickoff Doc
kickoff-doc.description: Create a builder-facing kickoff document from accepted planning artifacts when a team needs a durable reference organized by shaped product territory.

feed-planning-context.title: Feed Planning Context
feed-planning-context.description: Prepare a compact context packet when an implementation agent needs the authoritative planning subset, execution contract, non-goals, and verification target for one slice.

breadboard-reflection.title: Breadboard Reflection
breadboard-reflection.description: Compare accepted intent with implementation reality when code or a prototype exists, preserve both separately, surface drift and design smells, and prepare an explicit correction decision.
